name: claude-cert-domain1-slides
description: Slidev deck for the Anthropic Claude Certification study guide — Domain 1: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration

scripts._comment: Scripts call node on a RELATIVE path so an '&' in the project folder name doesn't break the Windows cmd shim. See README.

_versionNote: @slidev/cli is pinned EXACTLY (no caret). 52.14+ moved to vue-router 5, which double-prepends the --base on client-side navigation when served from a GitHub Pages subpath (…/<base>/<base>/2). 52.13.0 is the last vue-router-4 release and navigates correctly. Do not bump to ^52 / latest without re-testing Pages navigation.
